properties.headline: AI Engineer | CS Student at UT Dallas
properties.summary: Computer Science student at UT Dallas with production experience in AI/ML engineering, agentic systems, and computer vision. Built systems at Marriott, Snap Inc., and Nova Research. Multiple hackathon winner.
funFacts: Won Overall at HackSMU 2026, TAMUHack 2025, and Best Software at Headstarter Hack 2025
Built agentic observability systems at Marriott using AWS Bedrock
Deployed AR lenses on Snapchat used by real users
Best Freshman Cadet among 700+ cadets at Texas A&M Corps of Cadets
